thoughts_kodyengine_cibuildargs_88762058.content: The `buildArgs` function was missing `--from build` in `fix-ci` mode, causing pipelines to restart from taskify/plan instead of the failing build stage.

conventions_skillslockjson_1086897126199.content: Skills lock file (skills-lock.json) hash must be updated whenever a skill definition file changes — this is a required part of the skill update convention.

conventions_gitignore_1086899119640.content: When adding skill documentation that may produce transient files, the relevant artifact patterns are added to .gitignore in the same commit.

thoughts_kodyengine_cibuildargs_12394894.content: The kody-engine ci-build-args command must include --from build for fix-ci mode to skip taskify/plan stages and resume from the failed build stage.
